wolf_cull.name: Cull the Gaunt Wolves
wolf_cull.flavor: The wolves at the wood-edge have learned the taste of people. Thin them.

scavver_purge.name: Purge the Scavvers
scavver_purge.flavor: They are crawling closer to the village fire each night.

bandit_hunt.name: Bring the Cutthroats to Heel
bandit_hunt.flavor: Three farms have gone silent this month.

drowned_thresher_quiet.name: Lay the Drowned Threshers to Rest
drowned_thresher_quiet.flavor: They still reap. Stop them and the Reach can be sown again.

magistrate_unmade.name: Unseat the Pall-Sworn Magistrates
magistrate_unmade.flavor: Mourncross will not be itself while they keep passing sentence.

warden_hunt.name: Hunt the Stone Sentinels
warden_hunt.flavor: They guard tombs whose names have worn off. Free them.
